## Checklist

- [ ] One focused change; no unrelated edits bundled in
- [ ] Tests cover the change (or it is docs/infra only)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test` pass locally
- [ ] Consistent with `docs/architecture.md` (or the divergence is explained above)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, per CONTRIBUTING.md)
